name: Haya

skills.name: Moon's Farewell
skills.description: MarkEnhance Spends moon crystals to use skills. When all moon crystals have been spent, her Skill 1 and Skill 2 will enter their (full) cooldowns, and her next Basic Attack is enhanced, dealing extra damage. Skill 1 and Skill 2 apply a mark on hit. Hitting marked targets again triggers additional effects.

skills.name: Crescent Wave
skills.description: Damage Unleashes a beam of moonlight, dealing damage. Deals extra damage if a mark is triggered.

skills.name: Wayward Rays
skills.description: ShieldCrowd Control Releases orbs to deal damage while gaining a shield and increased Movement Speed. If mark are triggered, targets will be stunned.

skills.name: Moonscape Mirage
skills.description: DreamscapeCooldownShield Links to a hero, gaining damage reduction while linked. After a delay, they enter a mirage. Upon entering, she gains a shield, and her skill cooldowns are shorter. If she uses this skill again while inside the mirage, she moves 700 units away from the target.

tips: Haya (Mage): Tier S+ on international ranked — 49.78% WR.

faqs.answer: Haya is Tier S+ Mage with 49.78% win rate, 0.93% pick rate, and 3.01% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).
